title: Principal Instructional Designer at Khan Academy India

jsonLd.title: Principal Instructional Designer at Khan Academy India
jsonLd.description:
Khan Academy India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Indore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Khan Academy India:
Khan Academy India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Khan Academy India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
